message:
bd-321a.5: session connector conformance tests (32 tests)

- SessionHandle conformance: get_state fields, round-trips for name/model/thinking
- Dispatch taxonomy: denied (no session), invalid_request (validation), io (session errors)
- Cross-op parity: snake_case vs camelCase aliases produce identical results
- Full lifecycle integration test (set_name → model → thinking → entry → message)
- Error taxonomy unit tests covering all Error variants

Also:
- Fix dispatch_hostcall_session catch-all to use err.hostcall_error_code()
- Fix Error::validation for parse/unknown-op in session dispatch
- Fix HostcallOutcome::StreamChunk exhaustiveness in log_js_hostcall_end

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
